title: Australian income of foreign residents
description: If you are a foreign resident find out about pay as you go (PAYG) withholding from royalties and other payment types.
keywords: Foreign resident, withholding from royalties, pay royalties, PAYG

child_links.title: Withholding from royalties paid to foreign residents
child_links.description: If you pay royalties to a foreign resident, the amount paid is subject to a final withholding tax.

child_links.title: Foreign resident PAYG withholding – for individuals
child_links.description: An entity is required to withhold pay as you go (PAYG) from foreign residents (FRW).
